behaviors.behavior: buildSpawnEnv strips CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION (the proven jsonl-suppression trigger)
behaviors.evidence: pty-env-flicker.test.ts::'strips CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION (the proven jsonl-suppression trigger)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: buildSpawnEnv strips the defensive parent-session markers SESSION_ID/ENTRYPOINT/CLAUDECODE
behaviors.evidence: pty-env-flicker.test.ts::'strips the defensive parent-session markers (SESSION_ID / ENTRYPOINT / CLAUDECODE)' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: unrelated CLAUDE_* auth/config vars are NOT stripped (allowlist, not blanket sweep)
behaviors.evidence: pty-env-flicker.test.ts::'does NOT strip unrelated CLAUDE_* vars the embedded claude needs' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: webui's own CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER injection is preserved (ADR-098 not regressed)
behaviors.evidence: pty-env-flicker.test.ts::'preserves the webui's own CLAUDE_CODE_NO_FLICKER injection' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: caller-supplied env cannot re-introduce the child-session marker
behaviors.evidence: pty-env-flicker.test.ts::'a caller-supplied env cannot re-introduce the child-session marker' PASSED

behaviors.behavior: end-to-end: a real claude spawned via the fixed buildSpawnEnv with the exact poisoned server env now writes its flat <uuid>.jsonl
behaviors.evidence: real-function pty E2E harness: post-fix env has no CHILD_SESSION/CLAUDECODE -> jsonl_written=true size=68388

surface_verification.justification: Backend pty-spawn-env hygiene fix (server/src/terminal/routes.ts buildSpawnEnv); no client/** or web message-contract change. The load-bearing link (a real `claude` launched via the FIXED buildSpawnEnv writes its flat ~/.claude/projects/<cwd>/<uuid>.jsonl despite a poisoned CLAUDE_CODE_CHILD_SESSION=1 base env) was verified end-to-end with a dedicated real-claude node-pty harness (jsonl_written=true, 68388 bytes), which exercises the actual fix more directly than a web surface would.
